kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY VOLCANO ACTIVITY NOTIFICATION
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea ORANGE/WATCH - Episode 51 of the ongoing Halemaʻumaʻu eruption began at 8:30 a.m. HST on July 15. Communities may be impacted by wind-blown tephra; low level winds are out of the northeast and higher level winds are from the south.

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
